name: Devilled Crabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the crabs with boiling salt water and boil for 30 minutes.
2. Drain off the water, remove all claws, separate the shells, and remove the spongy fingers and stomach under the head.
3. Pick out all the meat and set aside. Clean the upper shells of the crabs thoroughly.
4. Melt the butter and add the flour, stirring until smooth.
5. Stir in cream and cook until the mixture thickens, stirring constantly.
6. Add parsley, mashed egg yolks, salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, and crab meat to the mixture. Mix well.
7. Fill the shells with this mixture and cover with bread crumbs.
8. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or fry in hot oil until golden brown.
